test-case.name: DmarcHelpers Module.Module Import.Should import the module successfully
DmarcHelpers Module.Module Import.Should export expected functions
DmarcHelpers Module.Get-ManagedIdentityToken.Should require IDENTITY_ENDPOINT environment variable
DmarcHelpers Module.Get-ManagedIdentityToken.Should require IDENTITY_HEADER environment variable
DmarcHelpers Module.ConvertFrom-DmarcXml.Should parse valid DMARC XML

test-case.description: Should parse XML with multiple records
test-case.name: DmarcHelpers Module.ConvertFrom-DmarcXml.Should parse XML with multiple records
DmarcHelpers Module.ConvertFrom-DmarcXml.Should handle invalid XML gracefully
DmarcHelpers Module.ConvertFrom-DmarcXml.Should handle empty XML
DmarcHelpers Module.ConvertFrom-DmarcXml.Should prohibit DTD processing (security check)

test-case.description: Should handle XML attachments and return Xml key
test-case.name: DmarcHelpers Module.Expand-DmarcAttachments.Should handle XML attachments and return Xml key
DmarcHelpers Module.Expand-DmarcAttachments.Should handle GZIP attachments
DmarcHelpers Module.Expand-DmarcAttachments.Should skip oversized attachments
DmarcHelpers Module.Expand-DmarcAttachments.Should skip non-file attachments
DmarcHelpers Module.Expand-DmarcAttachments.Should skip unrecognized file extensions
DmarcHelpers Module.Send-DmarcRecordsToLogAnalytics.Should require DCR_ENDPOINT environment variable
DmarcHelpers Module.Send-DmarcRecordsToLogAnalytics.Should require DCR_IMMUTABLE_ID environment variable
DmarcHelpers Module.Send-DmarcRecordsToLogAnalytics.Should require DCR_STREAM_NAME environment variable

test-case.description: Should not log sensitive clientState value

test-case.description: Alert pass-rate logic should use DMARC semantics (SPF OR DKIM pass)
